query: SELECT o.id, o.clienteNome, o.empresaId, o.criadoPor, u.nome as criadorNome, u.empresaId as userEmpresaId, u.role FROM orcamentos o LEFT JOIN internalUsers u ON o.criadoPor = u.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2c6X8ZdMLfMorTw.a9d38e417b6c --database hrYkQ7rTK4s8DYQBoB2Kee --execute SELECT o.id, o.clienteNome, o.empresaId, o.criadoPor, u.nome as criadorNome, u.empresaId as userEmpresaId, u.role FROM orcamentos o LEFT JOIN internalUsers u ON o.criadoPor = u.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 10;
